title: B.Ed Jobs 2026 – TGT English, Music Teacher and More
org: TGT English, Counsellor, Art Master, Music Teacher
shortInfo: The Sainik Schools Society Recruitment 2026 for 4 TGT English, Music Teacher and More posts. Candidates with B.Ed, Bachelor’s Degree, Diploma in relevant field Can Apply Offline. The offline application process has started, and the last date to submit the application form is 30-05-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through the official Sainik School Mainpuri website.

basic_details.job_title: Sainik School Mainpuri Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for TGT English, Music Teacher and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: TGT English, Counsellor, Art Master, Music Teacher
basic_details.short_information: The Sainik Schools Society Recruitment 2026 for 4 TGT English, Music Teacher and More posts. Candidates with B.Ed, Bachelor’s Degree, Diploma in relevant field Can Apply Offline. The offline application process has started, and the last date to submit the application form is 30-05-2026. The candidate shall apply offline through the official Sainik School Mainpuri website.

application_fee.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for all posts. Age Relaxation: SC/ST: +5 years; OBC: +3 years.

age_limit.details: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Sainik School Mainpuri Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Ed. or equivalent from NCTE, CTET Paper-II, Bachelor's Degree with 50% marks, Post Graduate Degree, Diploma in relevant field
qualification.details: TGT English: Four years integrated degree course from NCTE with 50% marks in English or Bachelor's/Honours Degree with 50% in concerned subjects + B.Ed. 50% or equivalent + CTET Paper-II. Counsellor: Graduate/Postgraduate in Psychology or Child Development or Graduate/Postgraduate with diploma in Career Guidance and counselling (min 50% marks). Art Master: Bachelor's degree in Drawing and Painting/Fine Arts with 50% marks + B.Ed. 50%. Music Teacher: Senior Secondary 50% + Bachelor's degree in Music as main subject.

vacancy_details.Post Name: TGT English, Music Teacher and More

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.sainikschoolmainpuri.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for Sainik School Mainpuri Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for Sainik School Mainpuri Recruitment 2026 is 30th May 2026. Candidates are advised to ensure their applications reach the school before this deadline.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available in Sainik School Mainpuri Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for the posts of TGT English, Counsellor, Art Master, and Music Teacher in Sainik School Mainpuri Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for TGT English?
faq.answer: For TGT English, candidates need to have a four years integrated degree course from NCTE with 50% marks in English or a Bachelor's/Honours Degree with 50% in concerned subjects, along with B.Ed. 50% or equivalent and CTET Paper-II.

faq.question: What is the maximum age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the advertised posts in Sainik School Mainpuri Recruitment 2026 is 35 years.

faq.question: Are there any age relaxations for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for reserved categories. SC/ST candidates get a relaxation of +5 years, and OBC candidates get a relaxation of +3 years.

faq.question: What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 500/-.

faq.question: What is the application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for SC/ST category candidates is Rs. 250/-.

faq.question: What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for Sainik School Mainpuri Recruitment 2026 includes a Written Test, Class Demonstration/Skill Test, and an Interview.

faq.question: What is the salary range for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The salary for the selected candidates will range from Rs. 20,000/- to Rs. 50,000/- per month, depending on the post and experience.

faq.question: How can I apply for these positions?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

seo_tags: Sainik School Mainpuri TGT English (Contractual for one year
extendable up to 3 years) (Unreserved) & More Recruitment 2026
